title: Snap Column Size when Holding Ctrl/Other Key
excerpt:
Hi, recently I’ve been resizing multiple columns to be the same size (such as Estimated SP and Actual SP), I would love an option to snap the column size to some fixed sizes when holding a key (such as Ctrl). 
That would…

posts.author: ashleymajar (Ashley Majar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, recently I’ve been resizing multiple columns to be the same size (such as Estimated SP and Actual SP), I would love an option to snap the column size to some fixed sizes when holding a key (such as Ctrl).
That would make the boards more organized and look better as columns have the exact same size.
